code: import React from'react';import{useApp}from'../context/AppContext';import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function Toast(){const{notif}=useApp();if(!notif)return null;const colors={success:'#22C55E',error:'#EF4444',info:'#0EA5E9',warning:'#F97316'};const icons={success:'✅',error:'❌',info:'ℹ️',warning:'⚠️'};const col=colors[notif.type]||'#0EA5E9';return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{position:'fixed',top:20,right:20,zIndex:9999,background:col,color:'#fff',padding:'13px 20px',borderRadius:12,boxShadow:'0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,.2)',fontWeight:600,fontSize:14,animation:'fadeUp .3s ease',display:'flex',alignItems:'center',gap:8,maxWidth:340},children:[icons[notif.type]||'ℹ️'," ",notif.msg]});}
